## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added/updated where applicable
- [ ] Local checks executed
- [ ] No secrets added to tracked files

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or private keys included
- [ ] IAM/AWS permission changes are least privilege
- [ ] Logs and examples are redacted where needed

Link issues or context here.
